Our Story

India's Heritage,
Delivered Globally

GLOBAL EXIM TRADERS is a registered export-import enterprise committed to delivering premium Indian handicrafts and fashion jewellery across global marketplaces.

Available on Amazon, Flipkart, Meesho, and Etsy, we operate with complete transparency, legal compliance, and international trade standards.

"We don't just sell products —
We export heritage."

With full statutory certifications and a commitment to quality, every transaction reflects our dedication to excellence and trust.

About Global Exim Traders

Registered Export-Import Enterprise | Indian Handicrafts & Fashion Jewellery Specialists

Who We Are

Our Heritage

GLOBAL EXIM TRADERS is a registered export-import enterprise committed to delivering premium Indian handicrafts and fashion jewellery across global marketplaces including Amazon, Flipkart, Meesho, and Etsy.

We operate with complete transparency, legal compliance, and international trade standards. Every product in our portfolio is curated with an unwavering commitment to craftsmanship, quality, and cultural authenticity.

"We don't just sell products —
We export heritage."

Our collections blend traditional artistry with modern sophistication — perfect for retail, gifting, and international buyers seeking authentic Indian luxury.

With an unlimited product portfolio and export-ready inventory, we serve both retail customers and bulk export buyers with structured logistics, quality assurance, and dedicated trade support — wherever you are in the world.

Legal & Trade Compliance

Our Certifications &
Registrations

We are proud to operate under full regulatory compliance ensuring secure trade practices.

🏛️

GSTIN Registered

Full GST compliance with proper billing and documentation for every transaction

📜

IEC Certified

Import Export Code — enabling seamless legal cross-border trade operations

🌿

EPCH Member

Associated member with Export Promotion Council for Handicrafts

💎

IIFJAS & IHGF

Active participant in India's premier jewellery and handicrafts trade fairs

📋

Proprietorship Firm

Officially registered proprietary enterprise under Indian trade regulations

🚢

Port & Shipment License

Authorized for international shipment and worldwide export logistics
